hero.body: From a single kitchen in Australia to 20+ stores and growing, 8848 Momo House is the home of plump, hand-pleated Nepalese dumplings and Oriental Fusion. We are preparing the next market and inviting founding franchise partners to climb with us.
hero.imageAlt: Steaming Nepalese momo dumplings in a bamboo basket

banner.title: FROM KATHMANDU'S STREETS, VIA AUSTRALIA, TO YOUR CITY.
banner.body: We have spent years perfecting the playbook across 20+ Australian stores. Now we are inviting a small group of founding partners to bring 8848 Momo House to new high streets.

story.label: Our story
story.p1: 8848 is the height of Mt Everest, and the bar we have set every day since opening our first kitchen. Today, 8848 Momo House is Australia's favourite Nepalese momo destination with 20+ stores and growing, and the world's first Nepalese restaurant franchise.
story.p2: Now we are bringing the same hand-pleated momos, Oriental Fusion menu and cheeky "Momoste!" welcome to new neighbourhoods, looking for founding partners to grow with us.

why.label: Why franchise with 8848
why.body: Owning an 8848 Momo House means stepping into a brand with proven product, process and people. You bring the passion, we bring the playbook.

items.title: First-mover opportunity
items.body: The world's first Nepalese franchise is opening new territories. Be the founding partner in your city before the territory is gone.

items.title: Crave-worthy menu
items.body: Hand-pleated dumplings, signature sauces and Oriental Fusion sharing plates designed for repeat visits and a strong average ticket.

items.title: Proven in 20+ stores
items.body: Battle-tested operations, supply chain and marketing playbook refined across 20+ Australian sites and ready for the next market.

items.title: Real partnership
items.body: We do not just hand you a manual. We build alongside you through site, fit-out, training, marketing and ongoing operations.

items.title: High Street
items.body: Flagship dine-in restaurants on busy high streets.

items.title: Food Hall
items.body: Compact kitchens in food halls and market locations.

items.title: Transport Hubs
items.body: Quick-service kiosks for stations and airports.

support.label: What you get
support.body: Every franchisee gets a complete launch and growth program backed by our operations, culinary and marketing teams.

investment.label: Investment
investment.body: Indicative all-in investment ranges including franchise fee, fit-out, equipment, training and working capital.

tiers.name: Express Kitchen
tiers.blurb: Compact takeaway / food-court format. Lower footprint, fast turnaround, perfect for transport hubs.

tiers.name: Neighbourhood
tiers.blurb: Our flagship high-street dine-in format, the full 8848 experience.

tiers.name: Multi-Unit
tiers.blurb: For experienced operators developing a territory of 3+ stores.

investment.disclaimer: Figures are placeholder only and not an offer to franchise. Formal franchise documentation will be provided to qualified candidates in line with local market requirements.

steps.d: Submit the inquiry form below. It takes about 3 minutes.
We meet, share the model, and answer your questions.
Financial review, references and a visit to a live store.
Formal documentation, territory and site approval.
Fit-out, recipe training, hiring and pre-opening marketing.
Launch day and the first Momoste in your neighbourhood.

testimonial.quote: The 8848 brand felt like family from day one. The recipes, the training, the marketing, everything was ready to go. We just had to bring the heart.

items.a: No, but it helps. We look for owner-operators who are passionate, customer-focused and ready to learn.

items.q: How long does it take to open?
items.a: Typically 6-9 months from signed agreement to opening day, depending on site availability and local authority approvals.
A modest royalty and national marketing levy on net sales, disclosed in full in the formal franchise documentation.

items.q: Can I take a regional territory?
items.a: Yes. Founding partners can secure multi-unit and regional area-development rights with dedicated operational, supply-chain and marketing resources.

items.q: Is the programme built for local markets?
items.a: Yes. Our franchise programme is designed around transparent disclosure, fair contracts, operational support and practical local market requirements.

inquiry.label: Let's talk
inquiry.lead: Tell us a little about you and the city you would like to open in. Our team will be in touch within 2 working days.
inquiry.cardBody: The first 10 partners receive a reduced initial franchise fee and priority territory selection.
inquiry.privacy: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by 8848 Momo House about franchise opportunities. Your details stay confidential.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your city, budget, timeline, or any questions...
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.successBody: We received your details. We will be in touch soon.
